Chart Loading Strategies

Bandwidth Testing & CO₂ Impact Comparison

Immediate Loading

All charts load instantly when the page loads. Full JavaScript bundle downloaded right away.

Initial Load
~120 KB
CO₂
~0.06g
Test Now →

Lazy Loading

Charts load automatically when scrolled into view using Intersection Observer. Reduces initial page load.

Initial Load
~15 KB
CO₂ Saved
~85%
Test Now →
